description: This file defines negation in the Past Continuous tense in Njo Viri (Balanda). Past continuous negation expresses actions that were not ongoing at a specific point in the past. Two negation strategies are grammatically licensed.

general_principle.structure: Past continuous negation in Balanda preserves the progressive marker 'ti-' and negates the clause using either the discontinuous marker 'maka … gba' or the preverbal negator 'kawilla'.

negation_strategies.structure: {"maka_gba_strategy": {"function": "standard negation", "structure": "Subject + maka + ti-Verb + (Object / Complement) + gba", "constraints": ["maka must appear before the ti-verb", "gba must appear sentence-final", "maka and gba must co-occur"], "examples": ["Ne maka timoliki gbi difo gba", "Ni maka tinangele zanga gba"]}, "kawilla_strategy": {"function": "emphatic or alternative negation", "structure": "Subject + kawilla + ti-Verb + (Object / Complement)", "constraints": ["kawilla replaces the maka…gba pattern", "gba must not be used with kawilla"], "examples": ["Ne kawilla timerego ŋo", "Uku kawilla timande gbi njü"]}}

aspect_preservation.structure: The progressive prefix 'ti-' must be retained in all negated past continuous forms.
aspect_preservation.notes: ti- cannot be omitted under negation; negation does not change aspectual meaning

word_order_rules.structure: Negation markers do not alter core word order.
word_order_rules.notes: Subject; Negation marker; ti-Verb; Object / Complement; Sentence-final gba (if applicable)

error_constraints.structure: Do not combine 'maka' and 'kawilla' in the same clause; Do not use 'gba' without 'maka'; Do not omit 'ti-' in past continuous negation; Do not insert 'noka' in negated clauses; Do not move 'gba' from sentence-final position

output: I was not eating fish
She was not drinking water

input: Danda maka titeli muru famvara gba
output: We were not sleeping on the bed
Uku was not going
Ngande was not coming home
They were not walking in the compound
She was not running fast
Uku was not working in the garden

input: Wiki maka timoliki gbi difo gba
output: The child was not playing in the compound
I was not watching the dog

input: Ne maka tivele njo balanda gba
output: I was not speaking Balanda
The girl was not writing words
I was not reading a book
He was not thinking about it
They were not knowing it
I was not asking them

input: Ngande maka tivele zi ndi gba
output: Ngande was not telling them

input: Wilii kawilla tikeye ti naa ni
output: The girl was not calling her mother
I was not loving you
He was not fearing the snake
She was not hating you
Ngande was not surprising him
He was not seeming calm
The girl was not tying the shoe
He was not cutting the pot
I was not pulling the door
We were not pushing the box
The girl was not washing the shoe
I was not hiding the beads
Ngande was not building a house
I was not creating words
She was not changing the words
I was not turning the door
We were not adding money
I was not describing Balanda
They were not helping the poor
Ngande was not initiating the project
I was not contributing to the project
The girl was not separating trash
We were not upholding the law
I was not wanting water
She was not giving money
I was not finding money
Uku was not trying the cloth
Ngande was not leaving home
I was not arriving in Wau
He was not sharpening the knife
Ngande was not imitating adults
We were not starting the project
He was not falling
